subject: [DOC] Remove Guilin infra tools compatibility note
commit_message:
[DOC] Remove Guilin infra tools compatibility note

This will be still retained in Guilin's own documentation branch

Change-Id: Iea5d0ef8e506cc92c36a17e0e5201cea072faa19
Issue-ID: OOM-1
Signed-off-by: Bartek Grzybowski <b.grzybowski@partner.samsung.com>
